economic_notes: Three government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Aspen Developments Inc., Muskeg Lake Economic Development Limited Partnership, and MLCN Community Store Ltd. GBEs had combined revenue of $24,032,392 and net income of $2,066,096 in 2020. MLEDLP made distributions including mortgage payments on Elders Care Home ($343,667), Christmas distribution ($75,000), education payment ($47,600), and Aspen dividends ($100,000). COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with potential future impacts noted.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Province is Saskatchewan based on Saskatoon Tribal Council affiliation and TLE agreement with Saskatchewan. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated): Aspen Developments Inc., Muskeg Lake Economic Development LP, MLCN Community Store Ltd. — combined GBE assets of $35.9M and long-term debt of $25.3M not on Nation's balance sheet. ISC funding includes large capital project flows through deferred revenue ($5.79M received for capital projects). Deferred revenue increased significantly from $3.07M to $7.02M. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. isc_funding includes gross ISC ($9,454,098) before clawback; total_government_transfers calculated as ISC net of clawback ($9,420,742) + Health Canada ($654,475) + CMHC ($241,720) + Saskatoon Tribal Council ($2,383,241) + Community Services/STC allocations = $12,700,178 approximately; osr includes equity income from GBEs ($1,565,526) and other revenue ($2,542,701) minus transfers not captured. COVID-19 pandemic declared during fiscal year with material uncertainty noted for future periods. Treaty Land Entitlement Trust maintained separately with own audited statements.
